ddls:
CREATE TABLE "defects" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect */,
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the severity level of the defect */,
  "closed_date" TEXT /* Date the defect was closed */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application affected by the defect */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date the defect was opened */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number when the defect was discovered */,
  "root_cause_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the root cause of the defect */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the development phase in which the defect was found */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project to which the defect belongs */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current status of the defect */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the user assigned to resolve the defect */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who reported the defect */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the defect */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the defect */,
  "reproduction_steps" TEXT /* Steps to reproduce the defect */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected result of the steps to reproduce the defect */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Actual result of the steps to reproduce the defect */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the defect was found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_root_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("root_cause_id") REFERENCES root_causes ("root_cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_severity_id FOREIGN KEY ("severity_id") REFERENCES severities ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_id") REFERENCES phases ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project to which the application belongs */,
  "technology_stack" TEXT /* Technology stack used by the application */,
  "deployment_environment" TEXT /* Deployment environment of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each development phase */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the development phase */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the development phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "root_causes" (
  "root_cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each root cause */,
  "root_cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the root cause */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the root cause */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("root_cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severities" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the defect the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., question, answer, note) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_defect_id FOREIGN KEY ("defect_id") REFERENCES defects ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, manager) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team to which the user belongs */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "defect_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the defect that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the defect before the change */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the defect after the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defect_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defect_history_defect_id FOREIGN KEY ("defect_id") REFERENCES defects ("defect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the defect the attachment is related to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., image, document, log) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_defect_id FOREIGN KEY ("defect_id") REFERENCES defects ("defect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* Reference to the team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_lead FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application to which the version belongs */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the application */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)
